name: Files (CSV, JSON, Excel)
description: Learn about Files (CSV, JSON, Excel) and its applications in computer-science.

content.overview: Files (CSV, JSON, Excel) is a fundamental concept in computer-science. {{viz:diagram-01}}
content.explanation:
This topic covers the essential aspects of Files (CSV, JSON, Excel). Let's start with the basic definition {{viz:formula-01}} and then explore the interactive model {{viz:3d-01}}. 
          
As you can see from the animation {{viz:anim-01}}, the concept behaves in a specific way. The data visualization {{viz:chart-01}} shows real-world applications.

Understanding Files (CSV, JSON, Excel) requires both theoretical knowledge {{viz:text-01}} and practical exploration {{viz:simulation-01}}.
content.whyItMatters: Files (CSV, JSON, Excel) is essential for mastering Data Science. The Lottie animation {{viz:lottie-01}} illustrates its importance.
